zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley是Roger de Horsley的兒子，於大約1255年出生在英國諾圖波藍德。他至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1318年住在英國諾圖波藍德法爾納姆且於1322年住在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯。他於1282年登記服兵役。他於1318年被列為served robert de umfraville, earl of angus。他去世於1322年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley是Roger de Horsley的儿子，于大约1255年出生在英国諾圖波藍德。他至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他于1318年住在英国諾圖波藍德法爾納姆且于1322年住在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯。他于1282年登记服兵役。他于1318年被列为served robert de umfraville, earl of angus。他去世于1322年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Horsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northeastern England): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hors ‘horse’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, such as Horsley (Derbyshire, Gloucestershire), Long Horsley (Northumberland), and Horseley Hills Farm in Wolverley (Worcestershire), probably referring to a place where horses were put out to pasture.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley was born about 1255, in Northumberland, England as the son of Roger de Horsley. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Farnham, Northumberland, England in 1318 and Morpeth, Northumberland, England in 1322. He registered for military service in 1282. In 1318, his occupation is listed as served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. He died after 1322.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley est né environ 1255, à Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Roger de Horsley. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Farnham, Northumberland, Angleterre en 1318 et à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre en 1322. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1282. En 1318, sa profession de son indiquée est served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. Il est décédé après 1322.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley wurde um 1255 in Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Roger de Horsley geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1318 hat er in Farnham, Northumberland, England und 1322 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1282 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1318 ist sein Beruf als served robert de umfraville, earl of angus aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1322.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley è nato il circa 1255 nel Northumberland, England come figlio di Roger de Horsley. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Farnham, Northumberland, England nel 1318 e nel Morpeth, Northumberland, England nel 1322. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1282. Nel 1318, la sua occupazione è indicata come served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. Morì dopo il 1322.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsleyは約1255年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでRoger de Horsleyの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1318年にはイギリスノースウンバーランドファルンハムに，1322年にはイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスに住んでいた。彼は1282年に兵役登録をした。1318年，職業はserved robert de umfraville, earl of angusと記録されている。彼は1322年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley(은)는 대략 1255년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Roger de Horsley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1318년도에 영국 노르스벌랜드 패른함에서, 1322년도에 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 살았다. 그는 1282년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1318년, 그의 직업은 served robert de umfraville, earl of angus이었다. 그는 1322년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de Roger de Horsley. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra em 1318 e em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra em 1322. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1282. Em 1318, sua profissão aparece como served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. Ele faleceu após 1322.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley родился около 1255 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. Его отца звали Roger de Horsley. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности фарнам, нортумбирланд, Англия в 1318 году и в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия в 1322 году. В 1282 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1318 годуработал по профессии served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. Он умер после 1322 г.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Horsley nació aproximadamente 1255, en Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Roger de Horsley. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra en 1318 y en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra en 1322. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1282. En 1318, su ocupación registrada era served robert de umfraville, earl of angus. Murió después de 1322.
